ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_traffic_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Formatted time of the log event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source address of the packet */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination address of the packet */,
  "packet_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the packet */,
  "payload_length" INTEGER /* Length of the payload within the packet */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number for packet tracking */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address associated with the packet */,
  "src_device" TEXT /* Source device identifier */,
  "dst_device" TEXT /* Destination device identifier */,
  "burst" INTEGER /* Number of bursts in the log entry */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Gap duration between packets */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "network_layer_protocol" TEXT /* Network layer protocol (e.g., IPv4, IPv6) */,
  "transport_layer_protocol" TEXT /* Transport layer protocol (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Router, Switch) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Device vendor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Device model */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., traffic, security, performance) */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Detailed analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., High Traffic, Security Breach) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pattern */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic pattern */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the pattern detection */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the pattern detection */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device involved */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_patterns_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network-topology" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "device1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first device in the connection */,
  "device2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second device in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., wired, wireless) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id")
)
